text.name: sf_removed_favorite
text.text: Da xoa muc khoi yeu thich

text.name: sf_confirm_remove
text.text: Ban co chac muon xoa '%s' khoi yeu thich khong?

text.name: sf_error_not_found
text.text: Khong tim thay phuong tien trong cua hang

text.name: input_SHOPFAVORITES_TOGGLE_FAVORITE
text.text: Yeu thich cua hang: Them/Xoa yeu thich
